summary: Matched several trophy/toy subsystem functions and improved one partial match by replacing raw M2C pointer arithmetic with small inferred structs and typed globals. The PR matched un_80306D14, fn_80315574, and un_80312018_OnFrame at 100%, and improved un_803102D0 from 0% to 72.38%. It also split data symbols for trophy archive filenames, added TyModeState in ty/types.h, typed un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive*, and made minor header prototype cleanup.
what_changed: Implemented un_80306D14 in toy.c using TyModeState at un_804A284C; it plays sound 0xAA when state->x0 is 1 and sound 0xAB when state->x0 is 2 via lbAudioAx_800237A8.
Implemented un_80312018_OnFrame in toy.c using TyModeState->x4 as the frame-exit condition; when nonzero it calls un_80311F5C and gm_801A4B60.

Implemented fn_80315574 in tyfigupon.c with local inferred TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner structs; it decrements x24 until zero, then sets inner->x4D, clears data->x10, and calls HSD_GObjProc_8038FE24 on HSD_GObj_804D7838.
Replaced M2C_FIELD access to un_804A284C offset 4 in tydisplay.c with a typed TyModeState* and state->x4 checks in un_803182D4_OnFrame and un_8031B9A4_OnFrame.
Added TyModeState to src/melee/ty/types.h with fields x0, x1, x2, x4, x5, x6, x8, and xA, enabling cleaner matching of mode state checks.
Partially implemented un_803102D0 in toy.c to lazily load trophy archive symbols with lbArchive_LoadSymbols when un_804D6ECC is NULL.
Adjusted config/GALE01/symbols.txt by reducing un_803FE678 from size 0x128 to 0xF8 and splitting out string symbols str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl.
Declared the new trophy data/model table string globals in toy.h.
Typed un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive* in toy.c and tylist.c instead of void*.
Performed minor prototype cleanup in headers by removing parameter names from Toy_RemoveUserData, tyFigupon_80314BE4, and fn_80314504 declarations.
Added placeholder comments for additional unmatched tydisplay functions: un_8031C354, un_8031C454, un_8031C5E4, and un_8031C8B8.
smart_moves: The author explicitly switched the PR to draft to clean up pointer arithmetic and try to extract a struct, which is reflected in the final diff by replacing M2C_FIELD usages with TyModeState.
Introducing TyModeState centralized repeated access patterns against un_804A284C and made multiple OnFrame functions cleaner and more reusable for future ty work.
Splitting the large data symbol un_803FE678 into named string symbols gave lbArchive_LoadSymbols proper named arguments, improving readability and likely helping matching of un_803102D0.
Keeping small local inferred structs TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner in tyfigupon.c allowed fn_80315574 to match without overcommitting to a public header layout that may still be incomplete.
Typing un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive* aligned the global with its use as the return of lbArchive_LoadSymbols and improved cross-file type consistency.
decomp_lessons: When several functions read the same global state block at fixed offsets, extract even a minimal struct such as TyModeState instead of leaving repeated M2C_FIELD pointer arithmetic.
Archive-loading functions often depend on correctly split string/data symbols; revisit symbols.txt when a decompiled call has awkward address arithmetic or unnamed string references.
It is acceptable to introduce narrow, local structs for matching a single function when the full structure is not yet known, but the names and fields should remain conservative.
Frame callbacks in the ty subsystem can share a pattern of checking TyModeState->x4 and then calling a subsystem-specific cleanup/update function followed by gm_801A4B60.
Improving type declarations for globals, such as using HSD_Archive* instead of void*, can unlock cleaner decompilation without changing behavior.
Header declarations in this project commonly omit parameter names when names do not add stable information.
naming_conventions: New data string symbols use descriptive str_* names tied to observed filenames/table labels: str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl.
The new shared mode-state type is named TyModeState and uses offset-style field names x0, x1, x2, x4, x5, x6, x8, and xA because semantic names are not yet evidenced.
Local inferred tyfigupon structs were named TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner, with offset-style members x10, x18, x24, and x4D.
Existing unknown function names such as un_80306D14 and fn_80315574 were preserved rather than renamed without stronger semantic evidence.
OnFrame suffix naming was retained for frame callbacks such as un_80312018_OnFrame, un_803182D4_OnFrame, and un_8031B9A4_OnFrame.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replace M2C_FIELD(global, type*, offset) with a cast to a minimally inferred struct when repeated offsets are stable.
Use exact-width fields and padding to preserve offsets in inferred structs, as shown by TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner.
For lazy archive loading, match the null-check pattern on the archive global before calling lbArchive_LoadSymbols with named string symbols and output pointer globals.
Model state-driven branches directly with small integer comparisons, such as state->x0 == 1 and state->x0 == 2 for sound selection.
For countdown logic, express the zero case and decrement case in C with explicit struct fields to match the control flow of fn_80315574.

review_feedback.text: The author said they were switching to draft while cleaning up pointer arithmetic and possibly pulling out a struct.
review_feedback.impact: The merged diff did introduce TyModeState and removed some raw M2C_FIELD accesses, suggesting the cleanup direction was applied.

follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that extend TyModeState with semantic field names or additional fields beyond x0 through xA.
Search for future work matching the remaining tydisplay placeholders un_8031C354, un_8031C454, un_8031C5E4, and un_8031C8B8.
Check whether TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner were later moved into a shared header or renamed with stronger semantics.
Investigate subsequent PRs improving un_803102D0 beyond 72.38% after the string symbol split.
Search for additional ty archive globals around un_804D6EA4, un_804D6EA8, and un_804D6ECC to consolidate trophy archive loading types.
